description: Versioned library of prompt templates used by Kublai for task creation across the Kurultai agent system.

agent-protocol-v1.notes: Legacy protocol with minimal structure. Sufficient for simple tasks but lacks clear success criteria.

agent-protocol-v2.notes: Current standard protocol with comprehensive structure. Includes clear success criteria and explicit boundaries.

research-protocol-v1.notes: Optimized for research tasks with emphasis on source validation and structured findings.

sections.execution_directive: Execute this task completely using your tools.

minimal-context.notes: Streamlined protocol for urgent tasks or well-understood work. Faster to create but may require clarification.

writing-protocol-v1.notes: Specialized protocol for writing tasks with emphasis on tone, style, and content structure.

sections.success_criteria:
## 3. Success Criteria

### Must Have
- [ ] Root cause identified
- [ ] {resolution_criterion}

debugging-protocol-v1.notes: Optimized for systematic debugging with structured investigation phases.
